regime_fall.current_status: Day 40 escalation intensifies with Israeli strikes killing IRGC intelligence chief Khademi and destroying 50% of Iran's petrochemical capacity, while Iran vows 'Operation Crushing Revenge' and continues regional attacks; diplomatic signals remain contradictory with Pakistan-brokered ceasefire proposals and a 5-day US bombing pause against hardline Iranian rejection and new hardline leadership consolidation.
regime_fall.last_major_event: Israel killed IRGC intelligence chief Major General Majid Khademi and struck Iran's largest petrochemical facility (producing 50% of national output), causing tens of billions in economic damage, while the IRGC vowed 'Operation Crushing Revenge' in response.
